---
title: ""
format: 
  dashboard:
    expandable: false
---

```{r}
#| include: false
library(DT)
library(duckdb)
library(ggplot2)
library(plotly)
library(dplyr)
library(tidyr)
library(knitr)
library(kableExtra)
library(sf)
library(mapview)
library(ggalluvial)
library(scales)
library(stringr)

source("../data_traite.R")
source("../fonction.R")


```


## COL 1 {width=40%}

### ROW 1 


```{r}
#| content: valuebox

value_box("Voies sans adresses actives", 100, "danger")

```

```{r}
#| content: valuebox

value_box("Voies sans positions", 100, "light")

```


### Tableau

```{r}
#| title: Type de voies

my_table(france_com %>% head(10) %>% st_drop_geometry())

```


## COL 2

### ROW 1 {.tabset}


```{r}
#| title: Nb d'adresses par voie

plot_quantile(
  df_long, x = variable, y = valeur,
  x_label = "Quantile", y_label = "Nombre d'adresses par voie"
)
```

```{r}
#| title: Nb de voies par communes

plot_quantile(
  df_long, x = variable, y = valeur,
  x_label = "Quantile", y_label = "Nombre de voies par commune"
)

```
